rounds: Two weeks of same outfit, same routine, going through the motions — the Joy Police held the line pretty effectively there. Then a colleague noticed the Apollo ring and you had a clean opening, and you closed the door on it. That one stings a little because the ring literally started the conversation for you.
pattern: They're letting you wear the thing but not be the thing.
focus: One stranger gets the real answer — doesn't have to be long, just true.
